title: Smoked Salmon Sushi Rolls
description: A delicious and easy-to-make sushi roll recipe featuring smoked salmon, wrapped in delicate Japanese tortilla.
instructions: Prepare sushi rice according to package instructions.
Cut the smoked salmon into thin slices.
Cut the green onions into thin slices.
Prepare the Japanese mayonnaise according to package instructions.
Lay a sheet of Japanese tortilla flat and spread a thin layer of sushi rice onto it.
Place a few slices of smoked salmon in the middle of the rice.
Roll the sushi using a bamboo sushi mat.
Slice the sushi rolls into individual pieces.
Serve with sesame seeds and green onions.
